purpose: compare personalized pressure-density maps before physical prototyping

pass_fail_thresholds.max_adjacent_density_jump_pct_note: Configured engineering threshold used by simulator pass/fail checks; not runtime-derived.

density_validation_notes.raw_density_pct_behavior: Raw/generated density may exceed profile ceiling prior to clamp or smoothing in upstream computations.
density_validation_notes.density_in_allowed_range_definition: density_in_allowed_range applies to final density_pct after clamp/smoothing.
